Mutton Biryani

instructions.text: Marinate mutton in yogurt, biryani masala and fried onions for at least 3 hours. (Tip: Use your hands to massage the marinade into every piece for deeper flavour. Cover and refrigerate for the full time for best results.)

Layer: half rice, all mutton, then remaining rice. Top with saffron milk and mint. (Fresh toppings right at the end keep their flavour and texture brightest.)

Add ginger garlic paste, spices and tomatoes. Toss on high heat, cooking 3 min. (Add a splash of water if the blender struggles to catch the ingredients.)
Return chicken. Toss everything together 3 min. Vegetables should remain crunchy. (Tip: Use a gentle folding motion to combine without breaking delicate pieces.)
